handlers.name: ChangeActionPointsHandler
handlers.description: Modifies actor's action points by a delta value. Can trigger skip turn if AP reaches 0.

functions.name: ApplyEffect
functions.purpose: Applies AP change from effect data. Checks for InterceptAPChangeHandler to potentially modify the effect.

functions.name: OnAdded
functions.purpose: Applies effect immediately unless actor is marked as delayed.

functions.name: OnRoundStart
functions.purpose: Reapplies AP change at start of each round (same logic as ApplyEffect).

functions.name: OnUpdate
functions.purpose: Handles negative AP changes - sets skip flags if AP would drop to 0.

0x58.name: APDelta
0x58.description: Amount to change action points (positive to add, negative to remove)

0x5C.name: ForceSkipTurn
0x5C.description: If true, forces skip turn when AP reaches 0 regardless of usable skills

handlers.name: ChangeActionPointCostHandler
handlers.description: Modifies the AP cost of skills matching a filter. Applied when skills are added and removed when handler is removed.

functions.name: OnAnySkillAdded
functions.purpose: Applies cost reduction to newly added skills matching the filter.

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Iterates all active skills and applies cost reduction.

functions.name: OnRemoved
functions.purpose: Reverses cost changes on all affected skills when handler is removed.

functions.name: TryRemoveEffect
functions.purpose: Attempts to remove cost reduction from a specific skill.

0x58.name: SkillFilter
0x58.description: Filter interface determining which skills are affected

0x60.name: APCostChange
0x60.description: Amount to change skill AP cost (negative reduces cost)

0x64.name: MinimumAPCost
0x64.description: Minimum AP cost threshold - skills with BaseCost < this are not affected

template+0xB4.name: BaseCost
template+0xB4.description: Base AP cost of the skill

handlers.name: InterceptAPChangeHandler
handlers.description: Intercepts and modifies AP changes from ChangeActionPointsHandler. Can convert flat AP changes to percentage-based changes.

functions.name: AppliesTo
functions.purpose: Checks if this interceptor applies to a given skill based on template matching and once-per-round logic.

functions.name: Consume
functions.purpose: Marks the handler as used this round by storing current round number.

0x20.name: LastUsedRound
0x20.description: Round number when handler was last consumed (for once-per-round logic)

0x58.name: SkillTemplate
0x58.description: Template to match against triggering skill (compared via UnityEngine.Object.op_Equality)

0x60.name: PercentChange
0x60.description: Percentage to modify AP (divided by 100.0 to get multiplier). Replaces the original delta.

0x64.name: OncePerRound
0x64.description: If true, handler can only intercept once per round

handlers.interaction_notes: When ChangeActionPointsHandler.ApplyEffect runs, it checks for an InterceptAPChangeHandler. If present and AppliesTo returns true, instead of adding APDelta, it multiplies current AP by (PercentChange/100.0).

handlers.name: ChangeAPBasedOnHPHandler
handlers.description: Dynamically modifies action points based on HP percentage thresholds. Updates when HP changes.

functions.name: GetThresholdIndex
functions.purpose: Finds the threshold index for a given HP percentage.

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Resets handler state at mission start.

functions.name: OnUpdate
functions.purpose: Main update logic - recalculates AP based on current HP percentage.

0x20.name: LastThresholdIndex
0x20.description: Last matched threshold index (-1 if none)

0x24.name: PendingAPRestore
0x24.description: Flag indicating AP should be restored from base properties next update

array+0x20+i*8.name: ThresholdEntry
array+0x20+i*8.description: Each entry is 8 bytes: 4-byte float HP percentage, 4-byte int AP modifier

handlers.behavior_notes: Iterates thresholds in order. First threshold where currentHPPercent <= HPPercent is selected. The APModifier from that threshold is applied via EntityProperties.UpdateProperty(type=6). If actor hasn't acted and current AP equals base AP, sets PendingAPRestore flag and marks SkillContainer+0x58 flag.

0x10.name: Skill
0x10.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler

actor+0x164.name: IsDelayed
actor+0x164.description: Prevents immediate effect application in OnAdded

actor+0x16C.name: ShouldSkipTurn
actor+0x16C.description: Set by ChangeActionPointsHandler.OnUpdate when large AP drain detected

entity+0xEC.name: StatusFlags
entity+0xEC.description: Bit 0 set by ChangeActionPointsHandler.OnUpdate on AP drain

container+0x58.name: APUpdatePending
container+0x58.description: Set by ChangeAPBasedOnHPHandler when AP restore is queued
